mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.platform_kpi_snapshots WHERE tenant = 'homebase' AND snapshot_date >= CAST(#{startDate} AS DATE) AND snapshot_date <= CAST(#{endDate} AS DATE)

SELECT kpi.snapshot_date as "snapshotDate", kpi.gmv as "gmv", kpi.total_revenue as "totalRevenue", kpi.total_commission_earned as "totalCommission", kpi.total_platform_fees as "platformFees", kpi.total_seller_payouts as "sellerPayouts", kpi.pending_payouts as "pendingPayouts", kpi.total_refund_amount as "totalRefunds", kpi.take_rate as "takeRate", kpi.total_orders as "totalOrders", kpi.total_units_sold as "totalUnitsSold", kpi.avg_order_value as "avgOrderValue", kpi.cancellation_count as "cancellations", kpi.rto_count as "rtoCount", kpi.return_count as "returnCount", kpi.active_buyers as "activeBuyers", kpi.active_sellers as "activeSellers", kpi.new_buyers as "newBuyers", kpi.new_sellers as "newSellers", kpi.total_products_listed as "productsListed", kpi.total_skus as "totalSkus", kpi.total_sessions as "totalSessions", kpi.conversion_rate as "conversionRate", kpi.cart_abandonment_rate as "cartAbandonmentRate", kpi.open_support_tickets as "openTickets", kpi.avg_delivery_days as "avgDeliveryDays", kpi.on_time_delivery_rate as "onTimeDeliveryRate", kpi.upi_pct as "upiPct", kpi.card_pct as "cardPct", kpi.cod_pct as "codPct", kpi.wallet_pct as "walletPct", kpi.payment_success_rate as "paymentSuccessRate" FROM hm_query.platform_kpi_snapshots kpi WHERE kpi.tenant = 'homebase' AND kpi.snapshot_date >= CAST(#{startDate} AS DATE) AND kpi.snapshot_date <= CAST(#{endDate} AS DATE) ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT lop.pipeline_date as "pipelineDate", lop.placed_count as "placedCount", lop.confirmed_count as "confirmedCount", lop.packed_count as "packedCount", lop.shipped_count as "shippedCount", lop.out_for_delivery_count as "outForDeliveryCount", lop.delivered_count as "deliveredCount", lop.cancelled_count as "cancelledCount", lop.returned_count as "returnedCount", lop.rto_count as "rtoCount", lop.placed_breach_4hr as "placedBreach4hr", lop.placed_breach_8hr as "placedBreach8hr", lop.packed_breach_4hr as "packedBreach4hr", lop.shipped_breach_24hr as "shippedBreach24hr", lop.cancellation_rate as "cancellationRate", lop.rto_rate as "rtoRate", lop.return_rate as "returnRate", lop.orders_per_minute as "ordersPerMinute", lop.refreshed_at as "refreshedAt" FROM hm_query.live_order_pipeline lop WHERE lop.tenant = 'homebase' ORDER BY lop.pipeline_date DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.top_products_today WHERE tenant = 'homebase' AND (product_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR sku ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR category_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))

SELECT tp.rank as "rank", tp.product_id as "productId", tp.product_name as "productName", tp.sku as "sku", tp.category_name as "categoryName", tp.seller_name as "sellerName", tp.units_sold as "unitsSold", tp.revenue as "revenue", tp.stock_remaining as "stockRemaining", tp.stock_status as "stockStatus", tp.avg_rating as "avgRating", tp.review_count as "reviewCount", tp.conversion_rate as "conversionRate", tp.refreshed_at as "refreshedAt" FROM hm_query.top_products_today tp WHERE tp.tenant = 'homebase' AND (tp.product_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR tp.sku ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR tp.category_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')) ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.top_sellers_today WHERE tenant = 'homebase' AND (seller_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR seller_id ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))

SELECT ts.rank as "rank", ts.seller_id as "sellerId", ts.seller_name as "sellerName", ts.tier as "tier", ts.gmv_today as "gmvToday", ts.orders_today as "ordersToday", ts.products_count as "productsCount", ts.fulfillment_rate as "fulfillmentRate", ts.rating as "rating", ts.health_score as "healthScore", ts.refreshed_at as "refreshedAt" FROM hm_query.top_sellers_today ts WHERE ts.tenant = 'homebase' AND (ts.seller_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR ts.seller_id ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')) ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.category_performance_daily WHERE tenant = 'homebase' AND summary_date >= CAST(#{startDate} AS DATE) AND summary_date <= CAST(#{endDate} AS DATE) AND category_id = #{categoryId} AND category_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')

SELECT cpd.summary_date as "summaryDate", cpd.category_id as "categoryId", cpd.category_name as "categoryName", cpd.gmv as "gmv", cpd.total_orders as "totalOrders", cpd.total_units_sold as "totalUnitsSold", cpd.total_returns as "totalReturns", cpd.return_rate as "returnRate", cpd.avg_order_value as "avgOrderValue", cpd.active_sellers as "activeSellers", cpd.active_listings as "activeListings", cpd.conversion_rate as "conversionRate", cpd.avg_product_rating as "avgProductRating" FROM hm_query.category_performance_daily cpd WHERE cpd.tenant = 'homebase' AND cpd.summary_date >= CAST(#{startDate} AS DATE) AND cpd.summary_date <= CAST(#{endDate} AS DATE) AND cpd.category_id = #{categoryId} AND cpd.category_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.seller_health_summary_daily WHERE tenant = 'homebase' AND summary_date >= CAST(#{startDate} AS DATE) AND summary_date <= CAST(#{endDate} AS DATE)

SELECT shs.summary_date as "summaryDate", shs.total_sellers as "totalSellers", shs.healthy_sellers as "healthySellers", shs.at_risk_sellers as "atRiskSellers", shs.unhealthy_sellers as "unhealthySellers", shs.new_applications as "newApplications", shs.pending_approvals as "pendingApprovals", shs.suspended_sellers as "suspendedSellers", shs.avg_health_score as "avgHealthScore", shs.avg_rating as "avgRating", shs.avg_fulfillment_rate as "avgFulfillmentRate" FROM hm_query.seller_health_summary_daily shs WHERE shs.tenant = 'homebase' AND shs.summary_date >= CAST(#{startDate} AS DATE) AND shs.summary_date <= CAST(#{endDate} AS DATE) ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.conversion_funnel_daily WHERE tenant = 'homebase' AND funnel_date >= CAST(#{startDate} AS DATE) AND funnel_date <= CAST(#{endDate} AS DATE)

SELECT cfd.funnel_date as "funnelDate", cfd.total_sessions as "totalSessions", cfd.product_views as "productViews", cfd.add_to_cart as "addToCart", cfd.checkout_initiated as "checkoutInitiated", cfd.purchase_completed as "purchaseCompleted", cfd.browse_to_cart_rate as "browseToCartRate", cfd.cart_to_checkout_rate as "cartToCheckoutRate", cfd.checkout_to_purchase_rate as "checkoutToPurchaseRate", cfd.overall_conversion_rate as "overallConversionRate" FROM hm_query.conversion_funnel_daily cfd WHERE cfd.tenant = 'homebase' AND cfd.funnel_date >= CAST(#{startDate} AS DATE) AND cfd.funnel_date <= CAST(#{endDate} AS DATE) ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.revenue_by_region_daily WHERE tenant = 'homebase' AND summary_date >= CAST(#{startDate} AS DATE) AND summary_date <= CAST(#{endDate} AS DATE) AND (state ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR city ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))

SELECT rbr.summary_date as "summaryDate", rbr.state as "state", rbr.city as "city", rbr.gmv as "gmv", rbr.total_orders as "totalOrders", rbr.avg_order_value as "avgOrderValue", rbr.active_sellers as "activeSellers", rbr.active_buyers as "activeBuyers", rbr.on_time_delivery_rate as "onTimeDeliveryRate" FROM hm_query.revenue_by_region_daily rbr WHERE rbr.tenant = 'homebase' AND rbr.summary_date >= CAST(#{startDate} AS DATE) AND rbr.summary_date <= CAST(#{endDate} AS DATE) AND (rbr.state ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR rbr.city ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')) ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT pa.id as "id", pa.alert_type as "alertType", pa.severity as "severity", pa.metric_name as "metricName", pa.threshold_value as "thresholdValue", pa.current_value as "currentValue", pa.alert_message as "alertMessage", pa.is_active as "isActive", pa.is_acknowledged as "isAcknowledged", pa.acknowledged_by as "acknowledgedBy", pa.acknowledged_at as "acknowledgedAt", pa.resolved_at as "resolvedAt", pa.created_time as "createdTime" FROM hm_query.platform_alerts pa WHERE pa.tenant = 'homebase' AND pa.severity = #{severity} AND pa.is_active = #{is_active} AND pa.alert_type = #{alert_type} AND (pa.alert_message ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR pa.metric_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')) ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.customer_cohort_metrics WHERE tenant = 'homebase' AND cohort_month = CAST(#{cohortMonth} AS DATE) AND measurement_month >= CAST(#{startDate} AS DATE) AND measurement_month <= CAST(#{endDate} AS DATE)

SELECT ccm.id as "id", ccm.cohort_month as "cohortMonth", ccm.measurement_month as "measurementMonth", ccm.cohort_size as "cohortSize", ccm.active_count as "activeCount", ccm.retention_rate as "retentionRate", ccm.revenue_per_user as "revenuePerUser", ccm.total_orders as "totalOrders", ccm.churn_count as "churnCount" FROM hm_query.customer_cohort_metrics ccm WHERE ccm.tenant = 'homebase' AND ccm.cohort_month = CAST(#{cohortMonth} AS DATE) AND ccm.measurement_month >= CAST(#{startDate} AS DATE) AND ccm.measurement_month <= CAST(#{endDate} AS DATE) ${orderby} ${pagination}
